summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitoutOS Phase 2 improvements including Programme Upload → Edit → Confirm workflow, Professional Gantt Chart Editor, Dependency/Prerequisite tracking, Pre-start checklist, Risk/Delay warning, and Resource/crew assignment UI. Backend APIs are fully functional, but frontend login integration has critical issues preventing full UI testing.

minor_issues.issue: API expects 'items' field in request body, not 'programme' as initially tested
minor_issues.impact: Fixed during testing - API now works correctly

integration_issues.issue: Login form submission fails silently - credentials are accepted but user remains on login page
All protected routes redirect to login page even with valid credentials

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (login, register, get current user)
Backend job CRUD operations with specific test job TEST-001 access
Backend Phase 2 Task Checklist GET/PUT APIs
Backend Phase 2 Task Crew Assignment API
Frontend login form field population and submission (form mechanics work)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend login integration - login form submits but doesn't authenticate users or redirect to dashboard. Backend authentication APIs work correctly, so this is a frontend-backend integration issue. Investigate: 1) Token storage/retrieval in frontend, 2) Authentication state management, 3) Route protection logic, 4) API response handling in login component.
